title: ArmadAI Project Configuration
description: Configuration file for ArmadAI projects (armadai.yaml). Supports both the current ProjectConfig format and the legacy FleetDefinition format.

agents.title: Agents
agents.description: List of agent references used in this project.

prompts.title: Prompts
prompts.description: Composable prompt fragments included in agent contexts.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: Skill directories following the Agent Skills open standard (SKILL.md).

sources.title: Sources
sources.description: Additional source files to include in agent context (e.g. docs/architecture.md).

FleetDefinition.title: Fleet Definition (legacy, deprecated)
FleetDefinition.description: DEPRECATED: Legacy fleet format. Detected when a 'fleet' key is present. Automatically converted to ProjectConfig at load time. Will be removed in a future release. Migrate to the modern ProjectConfig format using `armadai init --project`.

agents.title: Agent names
agents.description: List of agent names (file stems without .md extension).

source.title: Source directory
source.description: Absolute path to the ArmadAI source directory.

AgentRef.title: Agent Reference
AgentRef.description: Reference to an agent, resolved at runtime. Exactly one of 'name', 'registry', or 'path' must be specified.

oneOf.title: Named agent
oneOf.description: Agent looked up by name in project-local agents/ or user library ~/.config/armadai/agents/.

oneOf.title: Registry agent
oneOf.description: Agent fetched from the awesome-copilot community registry.

registry.description: Registry identifier (e.g. 'official/security'). Run 'armadai registry sync' first.

oneOf.title: Path agent
oneOf.description: Agent referenced by a direct file path (absolute or relative to project root).

path.description: Path to the agent Markdown file.

PromptRef.title: Prompt Reference
PromptRef.description: Reference to a composable prompt fragment. Exactly one of 'name' or 'path' must be specified.

oneOf.title: Named prompt
oneOf.description: Prompt looked up by name in project-local prompts/ or user library ~/.config/armadai/prompts/.

oneOf.title: Path prompt
oneOf.description: Prompt referenced by a direct file path (absolute or relative to project root).

path.description: Path to the prompt Markdown file.

SkillRef.title: Skill Reference
SkillRef.description: Reference to a skill directory containing a SKILL.md. Exactly one of 'name' or 'path' must be specified.

oneOf.title: Named skill
oneOf.description: Skill looked up by name in project-local skills/ or user library ~/.config/armadai/skills/.

oneOf.title: Path skill
oneOf.description: Skill referenced by a direct path (absolute or relative to project root).

LinkConfig.title: Linker Configuration
LinkConfig.description: Configuration for generating native config files for AI CLI tools.

target.title: Link target
target.description: Target AI CLI tool to generate configuration for.

coordinator.title: Coordinator agent
coordinator.description: Name of the agent to use as coordinator/orchestrator.

output.title: Output directory
output.description: Custom output directory for the generated config files.

ProjectDefaults.title: Project Defaults
ProjectDefaults.description: Default settings applied to all agents in the project.

mode.description: Default interaction mode. 'guided' makes agents ask clarifying questions before responding.

ShellConfig.title: Shell Configuration
ShellConfig.description: Interactive shell settings for armadai shell.

default_provider.description: Default CLI tool (gemini, claude, aider, codex).

default_model.description: Default model tier (latest:fast, latest:pro, latest:max) or concrete model name.

max_history.description: Max conversation turns to keep in prompt context.

ShellProviderEntry.description: A provider with optional model tier for shell tandem/pipeline.

provider.description: CLI tool name (gemini, claude, aider, codex).

model.description: Model tier (latest:fast/pro/max) or concrete model name.

ShellPipelineConfig.description: Pipeline configuration with named, ordered steps.

PipelineStep.description: A single pipeline step with a name, role prompt, and providers.

prompt.description: Role prompt describing what this step does.
